Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Dolphin Progress Release 2603 309 upvotes, 52 comments
  2. WolfIP: Lightweight TCP/IP stack with no dynamic memory allocations 98 upvotes, 13 comments
  3. Understanding the Go Runtime: The Scheduler 34 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. The Met releases high-def 3D scans of 140 famous art objects 235 upvotes, 49 comments
  5. DDR4 Sdram – Initialization, Training and Calibration 79 upvotes, 16 comments
  6. Shall I implement it? No 861 upvotes, 312 comments
  7. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 265 upvotes, 87 comments
  8. Malus – Clean Room as a Service 1056 upvotes, 405 comments
  9. Show HN: OneCLI – Vault for AI Agents in Rust 125 upvotes, 40 comments
  10. Forcing Flash Attention onto a TPU and Learning the Hard Way 48 upvotes, 12 comments
  11. Long overlooked as crucial to life, fungi start to get their due 95 upvotes, 32 comments
  12. Reversing memory loss via gut-brain communication 241 upvotes, 97 comments
  13. Language birth 18 upvotes, 3 comments
  14. Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources 73 upvotes, 27 comments
  15. Innocent woman jailed after being misidentified using AI facial recognition 418 upvotes, 214 comments
  16. The Cost of Indirection in Rust 88 upvotes, 38 comments
  17. Launch HN: IonRouter (YC W26) – High-throughput, low-cost inference 50 upvotes, 20 comments
  18. Returning to Rails in 2026 342 upvotes, 210 comments
  19. Full Spectrum and Infrared Photography 50 upvotes, 25 comments
  20. Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework 152 upvotes, 98 comments
  21. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 167 upvotes, 121 comments
  22. NASA's DART spacecraft changed an asteroid's orbit around the sun 109 upvotes, 75 comments
  23. Big data on the cheapest MacBook 312 upvotes, 256 comments
  24. “Design me a highly resilient database” 40 upvotes, 24 comments
  25. IMG_0416 (2024) 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. Are LLM merge rates not getting better? 121 upvotes, 112 comments
  27. ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 333 upvotes, 376 comments
  28. US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says 268 upvotes, 355 comments
  29. The Road Not Taken: A World Where IPv4 Evolved 59 upvotes, 126 comments
  30. Converge (YC S23) Is Hiring a Founding Platform Engineer (NYC, Onsite) 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 10:30am, 13 March 2026. Source here.
